name: ExtensionConceptMap_Group_Element_Target_DependsOn_Attribute
title: R5: A reference to a mapping attribute defined in ConceptMap.additionalAttribute additional types
description: R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` additional types (code) additional types from child elements (value)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.property` 1..1 `uri`
*  R4: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.property` 1..1 `uri`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.property` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` do not cover the following types: code.
The mappings for `ConceptMap.group.element.target.dependsOn.attribute` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: value.
